statement: In every magma, Equation 306 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * u`) implies Equation 3989 (`x * y = (z * (x * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0418
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op x x)) y)
